# ECLIPSE Lab — LLM/Agent Navigation

This file provides a concise map of key pages for LLM agents and web crawlers.
Canonical site: https://pelzlab.science

## Key pages
- About — https://pelzlab.science/about.html
- Contact — https://pelzlab.science/contact.html
- Hyperscale — https://pelzlab.science/hyperscale.html
-  — https://pelzlab.science/
- News — https://pelzlab.science/news.html
- Opportunities — https://pelzlab.science/opportunities.html
- People — https://pelzlab.science/people.html
- Publications — https://pelzlab.science/publications.html
- Research — https://pelzlab.science/research.html
- Resources — https://pelzlab.science/resources.html
- Teaching — https://pelzlab.science/teaching.html
